extName.description: Extension name shown in the browser. Avoid translating — proper noun.

extDescription.message: Rumble enhancement suite — ad/bloat removal, theater split view, video downloads, dark theme polish, and 130+ feature toggles.
extDescription.description: Short marketing description shown in browser extension store listings.

actionTitle.description: Tooltip on the toolbar action icon. Same as extName by default.

openSettingsEditor.description: Button label on the options page hero that launches the dirty-draft settings modal.

exportBackup.description: Button on the options page that downloads a full settings + per-origin localStorage JSON backup.

importBackup.description: Button on the options page that restores settings + per-origin localStorage from a previously exported JSON file.

resetAllData.description: Destructive button that wipes rx_settings and per-origin localStorage. Snapshots first if backupHistory is on.

snapshotHistory.description: Section heading for the rolling snapshot list (added v3.1.0).

snapshotTakeNow.description: Button that explicitly snapshots current settings.

snapshotRestore.description: Per-row button on the snapshot list that restores that specific snapshot. Itself snapshots-before-overwriting.

privacyReport.description: Section heading for the local-only privacy disclosure panel (added v3.1.0).

telemetryNone.message: Telemetry: none — no analytics, no remote logging, no usage beacons
telemetryNone.description: Disclosure shown in the privacy report. Match the rxBuildPrivacyReport.telemetry string exactly.

settingsTotal.description: Pluralized noun shown next to a count in the modal header (e.g. '197 settings').

settingsUnsaved.description: Pluralized noun for the dirty-keys chip in the modal header.

saveBtn.description: Save button in the dirty-draft settings modal.

discardBtn.description: Discard button in the dirty-draft settings modal.

restoreDefaultsBtn.description: Button that resets the draft to factory defaults (still requires Save to persist).

groupAll.description: Sidebar group name showing every setting at once.

groupCore.description: Sidebar group name for v2.0+ core engine + theming + accessibility keys.

groupAdvanced.description: Sidebar group name for power-user and debug keys.

tipDisableShortsFeed.description: Toggle label that redirects rumble.com/shorts to /subscriptions (added v3.1.0).

tipHideWalletTipButton.description: Toggle label that hides the per-creator Rumble Wallet tip-jar button (added v3.1.0).
